title: EaGirls remain top of log
description: GEORGE NEWS - The SWD EaGirls successfully...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The SWD EaGirls successfully defended their position at the top of the Women's First Division log with a 12-17 away victory against the Pumas. The half-time score was 0-10 in favour of the EaGirls.


> The EaGirls are looking strong, having gone undefeated in the first four matches of their campaign and with two matches remaining.


Their next match is against Griquas who are second last on the log.

The final match before the semi-finals will be against the Limpopo Blue Bulls who are currently in second position on the log.

Scoring:

Pumas Women 12 (0) – SWD EaGirls 17(10)

SWD EaGirls

Tries: Shannon Pieterse (2) Antoneica Hannies

Conversions: Antoneica Hannies

Pumas Women

Tries: Sonia Khumalo (2) Conversions: Alicia Mahlalela

SWD Eagirls individual performances: Antoneica Hannies has the most points scored (43) and most conversions (14). Chante Jonck has the third most points (30) and the second most tries (six). Shannon Pieterse has the fourth most points (25) points and the third most tries (five).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
